visual_description: Three men in black suits stand in a dim antique shop, each pointing a gun forward; the central man has short blonde hair. A bright blue magical burst erupts, revealing a woman who shouts, causing the men to look startled. The scene shifts to a close-up of a man in black looking down, then to an overhead view of a cluttered room where a woman in a dark coat stands near a table with glowing objects.
audio_description: A woman's voice shouts urgently, accompanied by a crackling magical sound.
